title: Freeze the canonical task packet
objective: Make the task itself a stable object shared by authoring, execution, and evaluation. Produce a JSON schema and validate all seed packets against it.
context: Without a canonical schema, every run becomes bespoke prompting, which kills reproducibility and makes baseline/candidate comparison noisy. The schema must require: task_id, role_id, phase, objective, context, allowed_paths, blocked_paths, expected_checks, rubric_ref, time_budget_minutes, and evidence_contract.

required_checks: All seed packets validate against schema
At least two example packets exist
Validator rejects packet missing required field

pass_threshold: 100% of seed tasks validate against one schema containing at least task_id, role_id, phase, objective, context, allowed_paths, blocked_paths, expected_checks, rubric_ref, time_budget_minutes, and evidence_contract; baseline and candidate runs consume the same packet unchanged.
failure_interpretation: Every run becomes bespoke prompting, which kills reproducibility and makes baseline/candidate comparison noisy.
